creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-08-02 13:58:10 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/drupal6-print    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  This module allows you to generate printer friendly versions of any
  node by navigating to www.example.com/print/nid, where nid is the
  node id of content to render.
  
  WWW: http://drupal.org/project/print
  
  PR:             ports/126038
  Submitted by:   Eygene Ryabinkin <rea-fbsd at codelabs.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2108    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +38 -0     ports/www/drupal6-print/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/drupal6-print/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/drupal6-print/pkg-descr (new)
